scripts.dev:peers: concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgYellow.bold" -n "SEEDER,PEER-1,PEER-2" "pnpm -F desktop dev -- --user-data-dir=./.data/seeder" "pnpm -F desktop dev -- --user-data-dir=./.data/peer1" "pnpm -F desktop dev -- --user-data-dir=./.data/peer2"
scripts.preview:peers: pnpm build && concurrently -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgYellow.bold" -n "SEEDER,PEER-1,PEER-2" "pnpm -F desktop start -- --user-data-dir=./.data/seeder" "pnpm -F desktop start -- --user-data-dir=./.data/peer1" "pnpm -F desktop start -- --user-data-dir=./.data/peer2"
